runs.note: Fixed security headers per SECURITY_BASELINE.md: changed X-Frame-Options to DENY, added missing HSTS with 1-year max-age and preload directives, added X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Cache-Control no-store for authenticated responses, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, and Permissions-Policy. Also fixed getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For from Cloudflare IP ranges.
